title: selaginella novoleonensis
intro: Selaginella novoleonensis is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spikemoss, which is a type of non-vascular, perennial plant that grows in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella novoleonensis include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of tea, capsule, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
